name: Chicken (or Scallops or Beef) with Fresh Sweet Basil
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound boneless chicken breast (or 1/2 lb. fresh scallops or beef)
3 kaffir lime leaves -- cut in thin strips
3 red chili peppers, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions: Thinly slice chicken (or beef), or rinse scallops and score diagonally. In a wok, heat oil over high heat until it bubbles. Add garlic and kaffir lime leaves, then add the chicken (or scallops or beef), mushrooms, bamboo shoots, oyster sauce, and red chili peppers. Stir fry for 5 minutes or until the chicken (or scallops or beef) is cooked through. Mix in basil and serve on a bed of chopped cabbage if desired.
